sources.title: AutoQuant: An Auditable Expert-System Framework for Execution-Constrained Auto-Tuning in Cryptocurrency Perpetual Futures

hypotheses.title: Funding-rate and open-interest overlay for SOL-PERP on Drift
hypotheses.thesis: Use positive expected carry only when funding edge remains favorable and open-interest expansion does not signal crowding, treating the funding model as a gating overlay on a bounded SOL perp signal rather than a standalone alpha claim.

sourceCitations.notes: Published 2025-12-27. The paper frames funding-bias and execution-aware tuning as validation and governance infrastructure rather than proof of persistent alpha.
